message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

class Application {
    Scanner input
    + main()
    + readName()
    + readAuthor()
    + makeJS()
    + makeCSS()
    + craftHTML()
}

class FileIO {
    # File inputFile
    + setInputFile()
    + closeInput()
    + readFromFile()
    + writeToFile()
}

class DirectoryIO {
    # String parentDir
    + DirectoryIO()
    + setParentDir()
    + mkDir()
    + writeToFile()
}

DirectoryIO --|> FileIO

@enduml
```
